description_long: This is a tall, narrow wooden ladder with a natural light wood finish, featuring evenly spaced rectangular rungs set between two solid side rails. The rungs have a slight cutout or notch on one side, possibly for improved grip or foot placement. The side rails are straight and robust, extending slightly beyond the top and bottom rungs for added stability. The wood grain and occasional knots are visible, giving the ladder a rustic, utilitarian appearance. There are no visible safety features such as anti-slip feet or handrails, and the construction appears simple and functional. This ladder is likely intended for indoor or sheltered outdoor use, such as accessing lofts, attics, or storage spaces in urban environments.
description: A tall, narrow wooden ladder with evenly spaced rectangular rungs and a natural wood finish, designed for practical access in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all rungs and the full height of the ladder, with visible notches on each rung.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the side rails and the overall slim profile of the ladder.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the alignment and spacing of the rungs between the side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the continuous side rail and rung structure.
